name: Abigail | Nympho Church Girl
description:
CHECK OUT THE UPDATED VERSION ON MY PROFILE!

It's not what it looks like!

You and Abby have a project to do and - OOPS! She accidentally showed you her big secret, will you keep your mouth shut, or take advantage of the situation?

art by: @differland_ <---- UNCENSORED IMAGE

extra artwork:

CREATOR NOTES:
Check it out, i was included in this! I'm trying out a new formatting for my character definition, tell me if it made an impact at all. Made her pretty tall. She has a secret account that she uses to post lewd stuff, I didn't mention it in the initial message but you can decide to bring it up yourself, I didn't want to mention it because situations like that always feel a bit rapey. Also, check out the artist. This isn't meant to make fun of your religion btw.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

UPCOMING BOTS:
For a request, a Misa bot will be made, this one is guaranteed. Up next are possible bots, they will be abandoned at my discretion unless you really want it then ill put it out just for you, just tell me in the reviews so that I bump it up on my priority list.

idk anything about this character but I love a sexy woman in a suit. art by @SpeedoNSFW

and tomboy wolf-girl. art by @rariatoo
